# Your V1 project

This project was scaffolded by [V1](https://github.com/wangchangwei/V1) — an open-source, AI-powered web app generator. Edit anything you want; this is your code now.

## Getting started

```bash
bun install   # install dependencies
bun dev       # start the dev server on http://localhost:3000
```

Edit `src/app/page.tsx` to change the home page. The dev server hot-reloads on every save.

## Useful commands

| Command        | What it does                          |
|----------------|---------------------------------------|
| `bun dev`      | Start the dev server (hot reload)     |
| `bun run build`| Production build                      |
| `bun start`    | Run the production build              |
| `bun lint`     | Run the linter (if configured)        |

## Stack

- [Next.js 15](https://nextjs.org) (App Router)
- [React 19](https://react.dev)
- [Tailwind CSS 4](https://tailwindcss.com)
- [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com) (in `src/components/ui/`)

Add more components with the shadcn CLI: `bunx --bun shadcn@latest add <component>`.

## Going further

- The V1 chat can edit any file in this project — just describe what you want in plain English.
- The V1 preview pane (in the workspace) hot-reloads against this dev server in real time.
- When you're ready to ship, deploy to [Vercel](https://vercel.com), [Netlify](https://www.netlify.com), or your own host. `bun run build` produces a standard Next.js output.

Generated by V1. Happy building.

content.thinking: There's a login page. Let me look at it to find the third-party login buttons.

Now I can see the login page. I need to remove the third-party login section. This includes:
1. The "或使用以下方式" (or use the following methods) separator
2. The GitHub and Google social login buttons
3. The `handleSocialLogin` function (no longer needed)
4. The `Github` and `Separator` imports (no longer needed)
5. The Google SVG inline (no longer needed)

Let me remove all of these. I'll also clean up the unused imports.

content.text:
完成。已从 `src/app/login/page.tsx` 移除第三方登录相关内容:

- **GitHub / Google 按钮** —— 整个社交登录网格已删除
- **"或使用以下方式" 分隔线** —— 连同 Separator 一起移除
- **`handleSocialLogin` 函数** —— 不再使用,一并删除
- **未使用的 import** —— 移除了 `Separator` 和 `Github`(从 `lucide-react`)

现在登录表单只保留邮箱 + 密码方式,以及底部的"立即注册"链接。如果想顺手把 `CardDescription` 提示语从"请输入您的邮箱和密码以登录"调整一下(原来"以登录"读起来不太顺),可以告诉我。
